---
title: "Dr. Peter Mere Latham"
---

## Dr. Peter Mere Latham

**Dates:** (1789-1875)

### Description

physician

### Biography

CMY refers to him as a friend of Margaret Roberts, and it seems likely to have been her stepfather’s brother Dr. Peter Mere Latham (1789-1875), successful physician, who retired to Torquay in 1865. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 1st [1873]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
